name: Xiaomi

dataResidency.euRegionDetails: Xiaomi's general privacy policy states it processes and backs up personal information through a global operating and control infrastructure, with data centers currently in India, the Netherlands, Russia, and Singapore. It also states EEA/UK/CH personal data may be shared with Xiaomi group entities, third-party service providers, or business partners outside the EEA/UK/CH under safeguards. No primary-source documentation specific to the MiMo API platform guaranteeing EU-only processing was found.

notes: Primary-source information for Xiaomi's MiMo API platform is sparse. Xiaomi publishes a general privacy policy with global transfer details and SCC language for EEA-origin data, but no primary-source MiMo-specific DPA, sub-processor list, retention schedule, or EU-only inference commitment was found on the consulted official sources.
